/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fvisibility=hidden -Wl,-rpath,$ORIGIN:$ORIGIN/libs:./libs:/lib,-disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,liblximagecmp.so -o liblximagecmp.so CMakeFiles/lximagecmp.dir/yidong_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lximagecmp.dir/ascend_infer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lximagecmp.dir/deep_difference_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lximagecmp.dir/ldc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lximagecmp.dir/image_matcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lximagecmp.dir/imagecmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lximagecmp.dir/base64.c.o   -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/acllib/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/acllib/lib64:/opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.3 -lascendcl -lacl_dvpp -ldl -lrt -lpthread /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.3
